mapper.select: SELECT A1.BUILD_ID AS BUILD_ID, COALESCE(A1.GUBUN1, '') AS GUBUN1, COALESCE(A1.GUBUN2, '') AS GUBUN2, COALESCE(A1.BUILD_NM, '') AS BUILD_NM, A1.DAY_VAL AS DAY_VAL, COALESCE(A1.BUILD_DESC, '') AS BUILD_DESC, COALESCE(A1.STTUS_CODE, '') AS STTUS_CODE, COALESCE(A1.CHG_USER_ID, '') AS CHG_USER_ID, COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.CRT_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '') AS CRT_DATE, COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.CHG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '') AS CHG_DATE FROM ARMBULD A1 WHERE A1.GUBUN1 = #{gubun1} AND A1.GUBUN2 = #{gubun2} ORDER BY A1.BUILD_ID ASC
SELECT CONCAT('BUL_', LPAD(COALESCE(SUBSTRING(MAX(A1.BUILD_ID), 5, 16), 0) + 1, 16, '0')) AS BUILD_ID FROM ARMBULD A1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ARMBULD A1 WHERE A1.BUILD_ID = #{buildId} AND A1.STTUS_CODE = 'A'
mapper.update: UPDATE ARMBULD SET GUBUN1 = #{gubun1}, GUBUN2 = #{gubun2}, BUILD_NM = #{buildNm}, DAY_VAL = #{dayVal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, BUILD_DESC = #{buildDesc}, CHG_USER_ID = #{chgUserId}, CHG_DATE = NOW() WHERE BUILD_ID = #{buildId} AND STTUS_CODE = 'A'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARMBULD ( BUILD_ID, GUBUN1, GUBUN2, BUILD_NM, DAY_VAL, BUILD_DESC, STTUS_CODE, CHG_USER_ID, CRT_DATE, CHG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{buildId}, #{gubun1}, #{gubun2}, #{buildNm}, #{dayVal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{buildDesc}, 'A', #{chgUserId}, NOW(), NOW() )
